subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath taught the Supreme Pen that which hath attracted the denizens of the Kingdom of Names, and hath sent down therefrom that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی علم القلم الاعلی ما انجذب به اهل ملکوت الاسماء و انزل منه ما
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastisement and requital, @contention and conflict, @methods of teaching the Cause, @the power of words; of speech
